description_long: This is an adult male figure dressed in business-casual attire, featuring a collared button-up shirt tucked into a pair of fitted trousers. The shirt is long-sleeved and neatly buttoned, while the trousers are straight-cut and paired with a belt. The figure's shoes are formal, complementing the overall professional appearance. The individual has short, neatly styled hair and a clean-shaven face. The hands are relaxed and positioned at the sides, and the posture is upright and natural. No accessories or carried objects are visible, and the clothing fits closely to the body, suggesting a tailored look.
description: A business-casual adult male with a button-up shirt, fitted trousers, formal shoes, and short hair, standing upright with hands at the sides.
description_view_0: Front view shows the button-up shirt, belt, formal trousers, and shoes, with the face and hands clearly visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the straight cut of the trousers, and the fit of the shirt along the arm.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the shirt, the belt, and the back of the trousers and shoes, with the hairline visible.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile, arm, and leg alignment, as well as the shoe shape.
attribute_clothing_type: long-sleeve button-up shirt and fitted trousers with a belt, formal style
